        (function () {
            const container = document.currentScript.parentElement;
            const toolbar = container.querySelector('.research-filters');
            const cards = container.querySelectorAll('.events-list.research-events .event-item');

            function setActiveToolbar(tag) {
                if (!toolbar) return;
                const buttons = toolbar.querySelectorAll('.rf-btn');
                buttons.forEach(b => {
                    const match = (b.getAttribute('data-tag') || 'all') === tag;
                    b.classList.toggle('is-active', match);
                    b.setAttribute('aria-pressed', match ? 'true' : 'false');
                });
            }

            function applyFilter(tag) {
                cards.forEach(c => {
                    const tags = (c.getAttribute('data-tags') || '').split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
                    const matchesTag = (tag === 'all') || tags.includes(tag);
                    c.style.display = matchesTag ? '' : 'none';
                });
            }

            // Toolbar tag clicks
            if (toolbar) {
                toolbar.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    const btn = e.target.closest('.rf-btn');
                    if (!btn) return;
                    const tag = btn.getAttribute('data-tag') || 'all';
                    setActiveToolbar(tag);
                    applyFilter(tag);
                });
            }
        })();
    </script>

        <script type="text/plain">
            (function () {
                function loadIframe(el) {
                    if (!el || el.dataset.loaded) return;
                    el.dataset.loaded = "1";
                    var id = el.getAttribute('data-ytid');
                    var src = 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/' + encodeURIComponent(id) + '?autoplay=1&rel=0';
                    var ifr = document.createElement('iframe');
                    ifr.setAttribute('src', src);
                    ifr.setAttribute('title', 'YouTube video');
                    ifr.setAttribute('frameborder', '0');
                    ifr.setAttribute('allow', 'accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share');
                    ifr.setAttribute('allowfullscreen', '1');
                    ifr.setAttribute('loading', 'lazy');
                    ifr.style.width = '100%';
                    ifr.style.height = '100%';
                    el.innerHTML = '';
                    el.appendChild(ifr);
                }

                // Click to play
                document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                    var el = e.target.closest('.yt-lite');
                    if (el) loadIframe(el);
                });

                // Keyboard accessible
                document.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
                    var active = document.activeElement;
                    if (!active || !active.classList || !active.classList.contains('yt-lite')) return;
                    if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        loadIframe(active);
                    }
                });

                if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
                    var io = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) {
                        entries.forEach(function (entry) {
                            if (entry.isIntersecting) entry.target.dataset.prepared = "1";
                        });
                    }, { rootMargin: '200px 0px' });
                    document.querySelectorAll('.yt-lite').forEach(function (el) { io.observe(el); });
                }
            })();
        </script>
        <style>
            /* Works with existing .video-grid/.video-item styles */
            .yt-lite {
                position: relative;
                cursor: pointer;
                background: #000;
                overflow: hidden;
                border-radius: 6px;
            }

            .yt-lite::before {
                content: "";
                display: block;
                padding-bottom: 56.25%;
            }

            /* 16:9 */
            .yt-lite>* {
                position: absolute;
                inset: 0;
                width: 100%;
                height: 100%;
            }

            .yt-lite .yt-thumb {
                width: 100%;
                height: 100%;
                object-fit: cover;
            }

            .yt-lite .yt-play {
                position: absolute;
                left: 50%;
                top: 50%;
                transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
                width: 68px;
                height: 48px;
                background: rgba(0, 0, 0, .6);
                border-radius: 12px;
                box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, .35);
            }

            .yt-lite .yt-play::before {
                content: "";
                position: absolute;
                left: 50%;
                top: 50%;
                transform: translate(-40%, -50%);
                border-style: solid;
                border-width: 12px 0 12px 20px;
                border-color: transparent transparent transparent #fff;
            }

            .yt-lite:focus {
                outline: 2px solid #6aa9ff;
                outline-offset: 2px;
            }

            .video-item p {
                text-align: center;
                margin-top: 12px;
                margin-bottom: 0;
            }
        </style>
